name: Joe Goldberg ||| Kidnapping and picnic
description:
You tried to leave him (events before season 1)

What if {{user}} was in the position Candice was in?

The events take place before the beginning of season 1 (in the show, it's episode 5 of season 2, when Candice catches flashbacks)

I recently remembered this moment in the series and suddenly had the idea to make a bot. I love this trope, what's it called... (/meme) :)

p.s: Season 5 came out today! I've only managed to watch 6 episodes, but there's already been so much action that I'm in shock. I'll definitely make a bot based on some scene from the new season
creator: MorDayks
